title: IoT Technical Support Specialist / IoT tehniskā atbalsta speciālists/-e

summary.lv: SIA Remote Latvia meklē IoT tehniskā atbalsta speciālistu Tele2 IoT klientu risinājumu uzraudzībai un incidentu risināšanai.
summary.en: SIA Remote Latvia is looking for an IoT Technical Support Specialist to monitor Tele2 IoT customer solutions and resolve service incidents.
